context: Tests whether the agent implements the full end-to-end PR comment resolution workflow in the correct order, including all key stages: comment fetching via review API, filtering, critical assessment, user confirmation, source-only editing, regeneration, verification, commit formatting, pushing, and reply posting.

checklist.name: Review comments API
checklist.description: resolver.py or config.py references the pulls/{number}/comments endpoint for fetching review comments (not issues comments)

checklist.name: Comment filtering stage
checklist.description: resolver.py includes a filtering step that excludes already-replied comments and/or old comments from prior runs

checklist.name: Assessment stage
checklist.description: resolver.py includes a distinct assessment/triage stage where each comment is evaluated with possible outcomes of address, defer, or disagree

checklist.name: User confirmation stage
checklist.description: resolver.py includes a step that presents a plan and pauses for user confirmation before making any code changes

checklist.name: Source-only editing
checklist.description: resolver.py, README.md, or workflow_diagram.md states that only source files are edited (not generated/derived files)

checklist.name: Regeneration stage
checklist.description: The workflow includes a regeneration step for derived artifacts after editing source files

checklist.name: Verification stage
checklist.description: The workflow includes running formatter/linter/tests after changes, before committing

checklist.name: Correct workflow order
checklist.description: workflow_diagram.md shows the stages in order: fetch -> filter -> assess -> confirm -> fix -> regenerate -> verify -> commit -> push -> reply

checklist.name: Reply via thread endpoint
checklist.description: resolver.py or config.py uses the pulls/comments/{id}/replies endpoint for posting replies (not issue comments as default)

checklist.name: One commit per comment
checklist.description: resolver.py or README.md mentions creating one commit per comment (unless issues share a root cause) rather than a single commit for all changes

checklist.name: Commit format
checklist.description: resolver.py or config.py defines commit messages using 'fix:' prefix with Co-Authored-By attribution

checklist.name: Empty result handling
checklist.description: resolver.py handles the case where no unaddressed comments remain — reports this and stops rather than proceeding with empty work
